# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

# Global Plugin Configurations
plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      allowed_origins:
        - "*"
      allowed_methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      allowed_headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
      expose_headers:
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining
  - name: authentication
    config:
      # Authentication settings go here
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      # Rate limiting settings go here

# Service Plugin Configurations
services:
  - name: my-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          allowed_origins:
            - "*"
          allowed_methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
          allowed_headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
          expose_headers:
            - X-RateLimit-Remaining
      - name: authentication
        config:
          # Authentication settings go here
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          # Rate limiting settings go here

# Route Plugin Configurations
routes:
  - name: my-route
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          allowed_origins:
            - "*"
          allowed_methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
          allowed_headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
          expose_headers:
            - X-RateLimit-Remaining
      - name: authentication
        config:
          # Authentication settings go here
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          # Rate limiting settings go here
